title: Silky Brazilian Chocolate Mousse
description: A rich and decadent dessert featuring dark chocolate and brandy, this silky mousse is a diabetic-friendly treat that's sure to impress. With its smooth texture and deep flavors, it's a perfect indulgence for any occasion.
instructions: Melt the chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval until smooth.
In a separate bowl, whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
In another bowl, whisk together the sweetener, eggs, and vanilla extract until well combined.
Temper the chocolate by slowly pouring it into the egg mixture, whisking constantly.
Fold the whipped cream into the chocolate mixture until no white streaks remain.
Spoon the mousse into individual serving cups.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
Garnish with fresh fruit or whipped cream, if desired.
